name: Low-Fat Pineapple Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese in a bowl.
2. Mix the gelatin with hot water until dissolved.
3. Make the pie crust using the crushed graham crackers and margarine.
4. Place the prepared crust into a sprayed 9x2x12 inch baking dish, reserving some crumbs for topping.
5. Press the remaining crumbs into the bottom of the baking dish.
6. Beat the evaporated skim milk until fluffy with an electric mixer.
7. Cream the softened cream cheese, gradually adding sugar and then mixing in the gelatin very slowly.
8. Add the beaten evaporated milk to the cream mixture and stir thoroughly.
9. Stir in the pineapple and pour the batter into the prepared baking dish.
10. Sprinkle the reserved crumbs over the top of the cheesecake.
11. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
This recipe yields 16 servings with a total calorie count of 177.0 per serving, containing 4.9g of fat, which is 24.7% of the daily value from fat.
